_comment: Evidence-based strength-of-schedule overrides + provenance, applied by scripts/seed_from_xlsx.py AFTER seeding so a reseed/clone reproduces the curated SoS (the source workbook has no SoS column). Teams absent here fall back to the confederation default in engine/params.CONFED_SOS. notes=null means provenance was not recorded.

australia.name: Australia
australia.notes: SoS 0.82 (was AFC default 0.72): beat Japan 1-0 & drew Saudi Arabia 0-0 in AFC R3 (top-tier AFC results), plus weaker games vs Indonesia/China/Bahrain. Boosted toward the Japan(0.84)/S.Korea(0.83) tier. [src: FIFA, Wikipedia, ESPN]

austria.name: Austria
austria.notes: Qual 6-1-1 VALIDATED: Euro 2024 GROUP WINNERS over France & Netherlands, beat Norway 5-1. High rating earned, not an artifact.

canada.name: Canada
canada.notes: CONCACAF/NL base + Copa America 2024 SEMIFINALIST (lost Argentina SF). SoS lifted for proven strong-opposition run.

colombia.name: Colombia
colombia.notes: CONMEBOL quals + Copa America 2024 RUNNERS-UP (4-1-1: beat Uruguay SF, lost final to Argentina 0-1 ET; 28-game unbeaten run).

japan.name: Japan
japan.notes: AFC quals (7-2-1, 30/3) + Tier-1 friendlies: W Germany 4-1, W Brazil 3-2, D Mexico, D Paraguay, W Ghana, L USA. SoS lifted: proved vs elite.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.notes: Copa/NL/GoldCup base + 10 Tier-1 friendlies (draw-heavy: D Japan/SK/Ecuador/Uruguay/Portugal/Belgium; L Colombia 0-4 & Paraguay; W Ghana/Australia). Friendly slump visible.

new-zealand.name: New Zealand
new-zealand.notes: Level-adjusted: raw OFC qualifying was 5-0-0, 29 GF/1 GA vs Pacific minnows — non-predictive at WC level

norway.name: Norway
norway.notes: Qual 8-0-0 (incl 2x Italy) BUT padded by 11-1 Moldova. Strong-opp overlay: L Netherlands, D Switzerland, D Morocco, L Austria 1-5, W Austria. Perfect record didn't hold up.

paraguay.name: Paraguay
paraguay.notes: CONMEBOL quals + Copa America 2024 REALITY CHECK: lost all 3 group games (vs Colombia, Brazil, Costa Rica). Weaker than qualifying implied.

south-korea.name: South Korea
south-korea.notes: AFC quals (7-1-2) + Tier-1 friendlies: W USA 2-0, D Mexico 2-2, L Brazil 0-5, W Paraguay, W Ghana. Brazil thrashing = reality check.

sweden.name: Sweden
sweden.notes: SoS 0.96 (UEFA default, UNCHANGED): genuinely poor form (bottom of WCQ Group B, 1pt/4) but vs strong UEFA sides; qualified via playoffs beating Ukraine 3-1 & Poland 3-2. Low rating trusted; WC upside handled by re-rate. [src: UEFA, Wikipedia]

switzerland.name: Switzerland
switzerland.notes: SoS 0.90 (was UEFA default 0.96): won WCQ group but vs mid-tier (Kosovo/Slovenia/Sweden); modest discount, 84.1 power exceeded Germany. WC 1-1 vs Qatar corroborates. [src: FIFA, UEFA, ESPN]

tunisia.name: Tunisia
tunisia.notes: SoS 0.55 (was CAF default 0.72): 9-1-0 GA0 in WCQ but vs Sao Tome/Malawi/Eq.Guinea/Namibia/Liberia (weakest CAF tier); lost 0-5 to Belgium, drew Brazil 1-1 & Canada 0-0 (Jun 2026). Perfect record discounted. [src: FIFA, Wikipedia]

türkiye.name: Türkiye
türkiye.notes: SoS 0.96 (UEFA default, UNCHANGED): WCQ Group E record (6-1-1) on a legitimate UEFA slate - drew Spain 2-2 (also lost 0-6), beat Bulgaria/Georgia/Romania/Kosovo. Leaky defense already in GA/g 1.50; no schedule-based discount warranted. [src: UEFA, Wikipedia]

united-states.name: United States
united-states.notes: Copa/NL/GoldCup base + 10 Tier-1 friendlies (W Japan/Australia/Paraguay/Uruguay/Senegal; L S.Korea/Belgium/Portugal/Germany; D Ecuador). Honest mid-tier.

uruguay.name: Uruguay
uruguay.notes: CONMEBOL quals + Copa America 2024 THIRD PLACE (beat Brazil on pens QF, lost Colombia SF). Strong, defensive.
